title: 10 best herbal teas for alzheimer’s disease
description: Peppermint teas helps with Alzheimer's disease because it contains antioxidants and flavonoids that help reduce inflammation in the brain, a common characteristic of the disease. The menthol content in peppermint also improves memory retention by stimulating blood flow to the brain, enhancing cognitive function and reducing symptoms such as confusion and disorientation. Additionally, peppermint tea's calming effects can reduce stress and anxiety, common triggers for memory lapses, allo...
